title: GLM-5.2 + OpenDesign: SOTA CHEAP DESIGN SYSTEM! This is AWESOME!
summary: This video demonstrates using GLM 5.2 with OpenDesign to generate high-quality UI prototypes including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile interfaces. The workflow connects GLM 5.2 through OpenCode and Z.AI's API, supports multiple installation methods, and produces HTML and CSS artifacts with consistent design properties.
writeup: The video pairs GLM-5.2, an open model for UI generation, with OpenDesign, a design system framework, to produce HTML and CSS prototypes for landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. It walks through three setup paths: a desktop app, source installation, and Docker deployment. The framing positions the combination as a low-cost route to generating design-system-driven UI mockups.
